---
title: "Final Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
  pdf:
    output-file: "report"
    toc: true
---

> The rendered PDF is available for download: [report.pdf](report.pdf)

## 1. Introduction

_Background on the topic and data. State the research question(s) / hypothesis(es). Narrative of the topic and why it matters._

## 2. Methods

### 2.1 Data source

_TBD — where the data came from, how it was obtained, the time window, the size of the dataset._

### 2.2 Data cleaning and wrangling

_TBD — missing values, type conversions, derived variables, filtering rules._

### 2.3 Exploratory tools

_TBD — summary statistics, static plots, interactive plots (see the [Interactive Viz](viz.qmd) page)._

### 2.4 Modeling

_TBD — chosen course-covered method (XGBoost / Random Forest / GAM / LDA). Feature engineering. Train/validation/test split. Hyperparameters. Metrics reported (R², RMSE, MAE, ROC/AUC, …)._

## 3. Results

_TBD — publication-ready, numbered, captioned tables and figures. Reference the website for interactive versions._

**Figure 1.** _Caption placeholder._

**Table 1.** _Caption placeholder._

## 4. Conclusions and Summary

_TBD — interpret findings in the bigger picture, connect back to the research question, state limitations and possible extensions._
